name: whatsapp-crm
description: Open-source framework for WhatsApp commerce automation and CRM workflows

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../worker && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.prisma:generate: cd backend && npm run prisma:generate && cd ../worker && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.verify:pre-release: cd backend && npm run security:check && npm run build
scripts.lint:all: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint && cd ../worker && npm run lint
scripts.test:all: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test && cd ../worker && npm test

author: Numan Ul Haq
